start.text: Evil never rests. Fortunately - neither do we!
The stage is set! Let justice be swift!
For every innocent that cried out - we have answered!
Stay behind us, citizens! This is our battlefield now!
Born from the dreams of humanity! My life - my fists are for those dreams!
You can change a person into a tree, but you can never change a heart that loves justice!

start_boss.text: So the true enemy reveals itself at last!
A worthy foe! Witness us at our finest!
This is the battle we were forged for!

retreat.text: This is not defeat! It is the end of the first act!
Remember this day, villains! It will cost you dearly in the rematch!
We withdraw - and return stronger! That is how it always goes!

victory.text: Justice prevails! As it always must!
And so the lanes grow safer once more!
Stand down, everyone. The day is won!
Let this victory light the way for the downtrodden!
Alone, we are pilots. Together - we are STARFARER!

victory_boss.text: Even the mightiest darkness kneels before the dawn!
Tell your masters, wherever they hide: these lanes are protected!

pursuing.text: Flee, then! Villains always flee before the finale!
Every step you run is a confession!

running.text: A hero knows when to bide their time!
Regrouping! Even legends must draw breath!

need_help.text: Comrades! Now is the moment for combination tactics!
To me, allies! Together, we are unbreakable!

out_of_missiles.text: My arrows are spent - my spirit is not!
The warhead was never my true weapon!

engaged.text: You stand before the red blade of the righteous!
If you are not a friend of justice..then you are mankind's enemy!

hull_90.text: Ha! A scratch upon the paint - nothing more!
You will have to try harder than that, villain!

hull_50.text: Now you have drawn blood! Now the true battle begins!

hull_30.text: Is this... the darkest hour? Then dawn is close!
My armor breaks! My will does not!

overload.text: A moment! Heroes are permitted... one moment!

death.text: You've broken my blade but not my resolve! We WILL meet again!
Ejecting! Evil wins no victory today.. only a delay.
Carry me clear, old friend... you've earned your rest.
